title: My priorities - James Murray for Ealing North
text_excerpt: My priorities - James Murray for Ealing North Skip to main content Homepage My priorities Get in touch About me More Menu My priorities In 2024 Labour formed a new government after 14 years of the Conservatives. There are no easy solutions but some of my priorities for Ealing North are: Tackle the cost-of-living crisis With economic stability, a growing economy, and keeping taxes, inflation, and mortgages as low as possible. Cut NHS waiting times With more evening and weekend appointments every week, paid for by a crack down on tax avoidance and non-doms. More affordable housing With new council and social housing, and new homes for first-time buyers, alongside a better deal for private renters. Crack down on anti-social behaviour With more neighbourhood police, paid for by cutting wasteful procurement, alongside a new network of youth hubs. Set up ‘Great British Energy’ With our new, publicly-owned clean power company, paid for by a stronger windfall tax, we will cut bills and boost energy security Further details Promoted by and on behalf of James Murray, all at Ruskin Hall, 16 Church Rd, London W3 8PP ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
